data.title: 国际服总力战 Perorodzilla (Indoor) 1
data.summary: [Total Assault Preview] Perorozilla(Indoor Warfare) will be held on 5/31 (Tue)! Do you have your str
data.body:
[Total Assault Preview]

Perorozilla(Indoor Warfare) will be held on 5/31 (Tue)!
Do you have your strategy all planned out? Discuss your strategy with other Senseis in our official Discord server!

http://discord.com/invite/bluearchiveglobal
#BlueArchive![F9lSWqKyLSEP1IZXSSxeumOYgN9fdCFh.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/F9lSWqKyLSEP1IZXSSxeumOYgN9fdCFh.jpg)

Perorozilla will be re-named as Perorodzilla.
